title: 小红书大字报封面
prompt_template: A bold Xiaohongshu (RED) cover image in 3:4 vertical format. Background: solid {background_color_hex} color filling the entire frame. Center: massive bold sans-serif Chinese headline "{headline_text}" stacked on 2-3 lines, font color {text_color_hex}, taking up 60% of the frame. Below the headline: small emoji icon {emoji_icon} and a one-line subheadline "{subheadline}". Bottom-right corner: small minimalist avatar circle. Style: high-contrast, eye-catching, scroll-stopping, RED app aesthetic, 1024x1024.
